name: Section 306 Stock Tax Avoidance Exception

eligibility.description: Requires establishing to the satisfaction of the Secretary that the transaction was not in pursuance of a plan having tax avoidance as a principal purpose.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Avoids ordinary income treatment on the disposition of Section 306 (preferred) stock if the taxpayer can prove the distribution and disposition were not part of a tax avoidance plan.
